zh.lifeSummary: 當John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach於1341年出生在德國貝也尼德爾巴也爾時，他的父親Stephen II Duke of Bavaria28歲，母親Elisabeth de Sicile31歲。他於1372年與Katharina von Görz-Tirol在義大利維圖特雷維索特雷維索結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年8月8日在德國貝也明陳享年56歲，埋葬在德國貝也明陳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach于1341年出生在德国貝也尼德爾巴也爾时，他的父亲Stephen II Duke of Bavaria28岁，母亲Elisabeth de Sicile31岁。他于1372年与Katharina von Görz-Tirol在意大利維圖特雷維索特雷維索结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年8月8日在德国貝也明陳享年56岁，埋葬在德国貝也明陳。

nameMeanings.name: House
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name for someone employed ‘at the house’, from Middle English hous(e) (Old English hūs), probably a religious house such as a convent. In the Middle Ages the majority of the population lived in cottages or huts rather than houses.
English: variant of   Howes  .

English: perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English huse, a southwest dialect form of Old English hyse ‘place overgrown with (water) plants’, a derivative of Old English hos ‘(water) plant’. In modern English, the name might have been absorbed into Huss or Hose .

variants.name: Huizenga
meanings: West Frisian and Dutch (mainly Groningen): habitational name from Huizinge in Groningen, a placename possibly composed with Middle Dutch huus, huse, Dutch huis ‘house’ (see House ).

variants.name: Houze
meanings: Altered form of   House   4, a surname of German origin (see   Haus  ).
French (Houzé): metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of boots and shoes or a nickname for someone noted for his footwear, from Old French ho(u)se ‘boot, shoe’.

variants.name: Howes
meanings: English:

pronounced to rhyme with hose, a variant of Howe 1 with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. Hose (Leicestershire), recorded as Howes in 1086, is named with the plural of Old English hōh ‘hill spur’.
pronounced to rhyme with cows, a variant of Howe 2 (see Hugh ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howse
meanings: English (Oxfordshire):
variant of   House  .
variants of   Howes  .

variants.name: Houseman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English hous ‘house’ + man ‘man’, denoting someone employed at ‘the house’, probably a religious house or convent. Compare House .
English: altered form of Oulsnam (itself a variant of Wolstenholme ), with metathesis of final -nam to -man and development of inorganic initial H-.
Americanized form of German   Hausmann   or Dutch   Huisman  .

variants.name: Huse
meanings: North German: from Middle Low German hūs ‘house’ (see House 1), which may also refer to an important building such as the town hall, a castle, or a manor house, so that the name would indicate dwelling in close proximity to these, or perhaps it is an epithet for a servant who worked at a great house.
English (Berkshire): variant of   Hose   and possibly a shortened form of   Hussey  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Profit’ or ‘sharp’.
2  ♀, ♂ ‘Upright’.

nameMeanings.name: Duke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use this normally represents a coinage parallel to   Earl   and   King  , but it has been used as a short form of   Marmaduke   from at least the early 1600s.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Bavaria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Collette, Marcel, Normand, Raoul.
French: unexplained.

en.lifeSummary: When John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach was born in 1341, in Niederbayern, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, was 28 and his mother, Elisabeth de Sicile, was 31. He married Katharina von Görz-Tirol in 1372, in Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 August 1397, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 56, and was buried in Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach est né en 1341, à Niederbayern, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Sicile, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Katharina von Görz-Tirol en 1372, à Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 août 1397, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à München, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach 1341 in Niederbayern, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen II Duke of Bavaria 28 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Sicile 31. Er hat 1372 in Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Italien Katharina von Görz-Tirol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. August 1397 im Alter von 56 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in München, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach è nato il nel 1341 nel Niederbayern, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Sicile, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Katharina von Görz-Tirol nel 1372, nel Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 agosto 1397, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a München, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbachが1341年にドイツバイエルンニーデルバイエルンで生まれた時，父Stephen II Duke of Bavariaは28歳，母Elisabeth de Sicileは31歳であった。1372年にイタリアベンエトートレヴィソトレヴィソでKatharina von Görz-Tirolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年8月8日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで56歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンムuンチェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach(이)가 1341년 독일 베이른 니더베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen II Duke of Bavaria(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Sicile(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1372년 이탈리아 븐토 트레비소 트레비소에서 Katharina von Görz-Tirol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 8월 8일 독일 베이른 u천에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 u천에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach nasceu em 1341, em Niederbayern, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Sicile, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharina von Görz-Tirol em 1372, em Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1397, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em München, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach родился в 1341 г. в местности ниедирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Stephen II Duke of Bavaria было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Sicile, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharina von Görz-Tirol в 1372 г. в местности тревисо, тревисо, винето, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 августа 1397 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия.

sm.Bet. 1392–1397: mai le 1392 e o'o I le 1397

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John II, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach nació en 1341, en Niederbayern, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Sicile, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Katharina von Görz-Tirol en 1372, en Treviso, Treviso, Veneto, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1397, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en München, Bayern, Alemania.
